Hello, world

Hi, I'm Alex Pienkowski.

Software Engineer

I build thoughtful, performant software with a focus on clean code and great user experiences. Currently open to new opportunities.

View My Work Contact Me

Projects

A selection of things I've built.

Stratos

Open-source AI-enhanced video processing platform built for Purdue ECE Senior Design. Split across three independent services (frontend, backend, AI). I designed the TypeScript/Bun backend — REST API, FFmpeg pipeline, async job queue, and Whisper transcription integration. Supports slow motion, frame interpolation, and subtitle generation.

TypeScriptBunFFmpegSveltePostgreSQLDockerGitHub Actions
GitHub →

Poneglyph API

RESTful API for the One Piece universe built with Go and PostgreSQL. Features OpenAPI 3.0 spec, custom API key authentication, IP-based rate limiting (token bucket), full CRUD for characters, devil fruits, and pirate crews, plus pagination, filtering, and API metrics.

GoPostgreSQLOpenAPI 3.0Goose
GitHub →

Chess Engine

Complete chess rules implementation in C with a 10×12 mailbox board representation. Covers legal move validation for all pieces, castling, en passant, pawn promotion, check/checkmate/stalemate detection, and FEN string parsing. Rendered with a clean raylib GUI.

CraylibMake
GitHub →

CHIP-8 Emulator

Fully functional emulator for the CHIP-8 virtual machine in C++. Implements the complete instruction set, a virtual CPU with registers, PC, stack, and 4KB memory, a 64×32 sprite renderer with collision detection, the fetch–decode–execute cycle, hex keypad input, and delay/sound timers.

C++SDLLow-level systems
GitHub →
